Container.Name: growatt-poller
Container.Overview: Polls your Growatt solar inverter every 5 minutes and pushes real-time power data to Home Assistant as sensors. Supports SPH inverters on the shiner-us.growatt.com portal.

Config.Name: Growatt Portal URL
Config.Description: Growatt portal for your region. US/Canada: shiner-us.growatt.com. Other regions: server.growatt.com or your regional portal.

Config.Name: Growatt Username
Config.Description: Email address you use to log into the Growatt portal.

Config.Name: Device Serial Number
Config.Description: Your inverter serial number. Find it in the Growatt portal under Devices, or on the inverter label.

Config.Name: Home Assistant URL
Config.Description: URL to your Home Assistant instance. Use the local IP, not a Cloudflare tunnel.

Config.Name: Home Assistant Token
Config.Description: Long-lived access token from Home Assistant. Generate one at: HA → Profile → Long-Lived Access Tokens.

Config.Name: Poll Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to poll the Growatt API. Default is 300 (5 minutes). Minimum recommended: 60.
